parts.name: Part 1
parts.instructions: You must answer this question. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: In your English class you have been talking about how culture is becoming more global. Now your English teacher has asked you to write an essay. Write an essay using all the notes and giving reasons for your point of view.

stimulus.body:
"Because of the internet, young people all over the world are becoming more and more similar. Is this a good thing?"

Notes

Write about:
1. music and fashion
2. local traditions
3. ............... (your own idea)

bullets: give reasons for your point of view

parts.name: Part 2
parts.instructions: Answer one of these questions. Write 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

tasks.lead: You see this announcement in an international English-language magazine.

stimulus.title: THE WORLD ON MY STREET
stimulus.body: Global culture is no longer something you travel to find — it comes to you. Write an article describing the international influences you notice in your own town, explaining which ones have improved daily life, and saying whether anything important is being lost.

bullets: international influences in your own town
which ones have improved daily life
whether anything important is being lost

tasks.lead: You see this announcement on an English-language film website.

stimulus.title: Stories that crossed borders
stimulus.body: Some films and series made in one country become worldwide hits. Write a review of a film or series from a country other than your own, describing what it shows about the culture it comes from, and explaining why you think it succeeded with audiences everywhere.

bullets: what it shows about its culture
why it succeeded with audiences everywhere

tasks.lead: The international officer at your college wants local and international students to mix more and has asked you to write a report.

stimulus.title: Report: bringing local and international students together
stimulus.body: Describe how much local and international students at your college currently mix, explain the main barriers that keep the two groups apart, and suggest two events or activities that would bring them together.

bullets: how much the two groups currently mix
two events or activities to bring them together
